recommendations.title: One Hundred and One Dalmatians
recommendations.overview: When a litter of dalmatian puppies are abducted by the minions of Cruella De Vil, the parents must find them before she uses them for a diabolical fashion statement.
recommendations.director: Hamilton Luske, Clyde Geronimi, Wolfgang Reitherman

recommendations.title: The Rescuers
recommendations.overview: Two agents of the mouse-run International Rescue Aid Society search for a little orphan girl kidnapped by sinister treasure hunters.
recommendations.director: Art Stevens, John Lounsbery, Wolfgang Reitherman

recommendations.title: The Jungle Book
recommendations.overview: The boy Mowgli makes his way to the man-village with Bagheera, the wise panther. Along the way he meets jazzy King Louie, the hypnotic snake Kaa and the lovable, happy-go-lucky bear Baloo, who teaches Mowgli "The Bare Necessities" of life and the tru

recommendations.title: The Sword in the Stone
recommendations.overview: Wart is a young boy who aspires to be a knight's squire. On a hunting trip he falls in on Merlin, a powerful but amnesiac wizard who has plans for him beyond mere squiredom. He starts by trying to give him an education, believing that once one has an

recommendations.title: Robin Hood
recommendations.overview: With King Richard off to the Crusades, Prince John and his slithering minion, Sir Hiss, set about taxing Nottingham's citizens with support from the corrupt sheriff - and staunch opposition by the wily Robin Hood and his band of merry men.

recommendations.title: The Aristocats
recommendations.overview: When Madame Adelaide Bonfamille leaves her fortune to Duchess and her children—Bonfamille’s beloved family of cats—the butler plots to steal the money and kidnaps the legatees, leaving them out on a country road. All seems lost until the wily Thomas

recommendations.title: Alice in Wonderland
recommendations.overview: On a golden afternoon, wildly curious young Alice tumbles into the burrow and enters the merry, madcap world of Wonderland full of whimsical escapades.
recommendations.director: Clyde Geronimi, Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson

recommendations.title: Peter Pan
recommendations.overview: Leaving the safety of their nursery behind, Wendy, Michael and John follow Peter Pan to a magical world where childhood lasts forever. But while in Neverland, the kids must face Captain Hook and foil his attempts to get rid of Peter for good.
recommendations.director: Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson, Clyde Geronimi

recommendations.title: The Ugly Duckling
recommendations.overview: An outcast duckling's search for a family to accept him leads to constant rejection before learning his true identity as a swan.
recommendations.director: Hamilton Luske, Clyde Geronimi, Jack Cutting

recommendations.title: Winnie the Pooh and the Blustery Day
recommendations.overview: Winnie the Pooh and his friends experience high winds, heavy rains, and a flood in Hundred Acre Wood.
